title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 86.920 - Retirement board established, responsibility for operation of retirement system
text:
86.920.  Retirement board established, responsibility for operation of retirement system. — The general administration and the responsibility for the proper operation of the retirement system and for making effective the provisions of sections 86.900 to 86.1280 are hereby vested in a retirement board of nine persons.
(L. 2005 H.B. 323)
